name: Sumo Auto Parts
description: Auckland specialist in Japanese and European used and aftermarket car parts. 1,200+ parts in stock.

contact.address: 133 Pilkington Road, Panmure, Auckland 1072, New Zealand

tools.name: parts_enquiry
tools.description: Submit a parts enquiry to Sumo Auto Parts. Provide your name, email, vehicle details, registration number and the part you need.

inputs.name: vehicle
inputs.description: Vehicle year, make and model e.g. 2012 Nissan Serena C26

inputs.name: notes
inputs.description: Additional notes such as colour code or condition preference

tools.name: search_japanese_stock
tools.description: Search 1,245 Japanese used parts in stock. Filter by make (Nissan, Toyota, Honda, Mazda, Subaru, Mitsubishi, Suzuki), model, chassis code or part type.

tools.name: view_european_parts
tools.description: Browse European used vehicle parts and new aftermarket parts including VW, Audi, Range Rover, Land Rover, Mercedes, BMW, Mini, Jaguar.
